name: TaMari Fleming

transcripts.q3: Hi, my name is Tamara flamie. My experience with kids are I used to babysit a lot for my family members because they did work during the day and overnight. So I have experience with newborns to toddlers. And even 10 year olds. The reason why I want to work in child care, I love kids. I do want my own child one day. but I also love kids, I have guy kids Nieces nephews I just love kids a lot the same way I love older people. I'm also a CNA. I do have my CPR certificate and first aid certificate I'm 20 years old. And that's pretty much it about me. I really do hope I am fit and picked to be able to work with up kid.

About 15 miles, maybe 20 miles, but that's the farthest because I am currently driving my mother's car and she do need her car sometime. So I don't want to be that far out.

transcripts.q6: My first time dealing with two kids, having a conflict, I pulled each kid to the side, had a conversation with them. Got each child's point of view and listen in head, hear what they said on both ends, you can't put together anything or come up with anything without hearing both sides of the story. But at the end of the day, I made them talk it out. Say sorry to each other and hug it out. And after that day, went on good.
transcripts.q7: I know, I will make a great up kid teacher, because I have a passion for seeing kids, do good. Like, I love kids, I love children. It doesn't matter the age, nothing. That's why I think I would be a great teacher for, okay.
